Accuracy

#note  --> Attached eval iteration outputs in evaluation folder for each iteration of fixes in extraction,
| Doc | Score | Note |
|---|---|---|
| doc_001 | 88.4% | minor mismatches |
| doc_002 | 69.3% | per-visit vs per-patient dates |
| doc_003 | 0% | GT=1, extracted 2 |
| doc_004 | 0% | same as doc_003 |
| doc_005 | 85.7% | 3 records missed |
| doc_006 | 99% | near-perfect |
| doc_007 | 79.5% | slight over-extract |
| doc_008 | 31.9% | 1474 extracted vs GT 100 |
| doc_009 | 0% | GT=1 aggregate, extracted 53 |
| doc_010 | 0% | GT=1, extracted 28 |
| doc_011 | 57.7% | field accuracy limited |
| doc_012 | 99% | near-perfect |

Root causes 
1. doc_002/008: GT = per-patient date range spanning years; model extracts per-visit rows
2. doc_003/004: scoring penalizes count mismatch — extracted record likely correct
3. doc_009/010: 129/151 page docs, GT=1 aggregate; model extracts per-encounter (correct behavior but wrong for GT)
